old_value: {"id":"project-LICHEN-2auf.48.2","title":"Prevent OSCORE context nonce reuse","description":"Rust OSCORE Context derives Clone, recreation always starts sender sequence at zero, and repeated protect_response(include_piv=false) for one request can reuse the same key/nonce. Remove clonable mutable nonce state, add validated persistent/restored sender sequence requirements or reservation semantics, make ordinary no-PIV response protection one-shot, and preserve SeqExhausted distinctly through lichen-node.","design":"Mutable sender/replay state must have one owner. Shared tasks use synchronization around one Context, not copies. Persistence must fail closed rather than silently restarting at zero.","acceptance_criteria":"Context cannot be cloned; validated restoration survives restart without nonce reuse; repeated no-PIV response protection rejects; Observe/multiple-response behavior has an explicit safe API; lichen-node exposes exhaustion/context-rotation status; tests demonstrate unique nonces and failure modes; no_std/all-feature tests, Clippy, and three security reviews pass.","status":"open","priority":0,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-17T22:58:30.654895Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-17T22:58:30.654895Z","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"project-LICHEN-2auf.48.2","depends_on_id":"project-LICHEN-2auf.48","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-07-17T22:58:30.780156Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"}]}

{"id":"project-LICHEN-2auf.48.2","title":"Prevent OSCORE context nonce reuse","description":"Rust OSCORE Context derives Clone, recreation always starts sender sequence at zero, and repeated protect_response(include_piv=false) for one request can reuse the same key/nonce. Remove clonable mutable nonce state, add validated persistent/restored sender sequence requirements or reservation semantics, make ordinary no-PIV response protection one-shot, and preserve SeqExhausted distinctly through lichen-node.","design":"Mutable sender/replay state must have one owner. Shared tasks use synchronization around one Context, not copies. Persistence must fail closed rather than silently restarting at zero.","acceptance_criteria":"Context cannot be cloned; validated restoration survives restart without nonce reuse; repeated no-PIV response protection rejects; Observe/multiple-response behavior has an explicit safe API; lichen-node exposes exhaustion/context-rotation status; tests demonstrate unique nonces and failure modes; no_std/all-feature tests, Clippy, and three security reviews pass.","status":"in_progress","priority":0,"issue_type":"bug","assignee":"Mark Atwood","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-17T22:58:30.654895Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-18T00:16:03.312258Z","started_at":"2026-07-18T00:16:03.312258Z","lease_expires_at":"2026-07-18T00:21:03.312258Z","heartbeat_at":"2026-07-18T00:16:03.312258Z","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"project-LICHEN-2auf.48.2","depends_on_id":"project-LICHEN-2auf.48","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-07-17T22:58:30.780156Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"}]}
new_value: {"notes":"Partial safeguards implemented on integration/oscore-recovery after d8f842b0d: Context no longer Clone; bounded ordinary-response one-shot tracking; restored contexts disable no-PIV responses; explicit notification replay API; requester KID binding; validated sender-state restore; distinct node ContextExhausted; reservation callback runs before transmission and failures stop send. Gates pass: OSCORE all-feature 54 tests, no-default 40 tests, node std 124 tests, library Clippy, diff check. Final hashes before commit: lib.rs f82ff345db8402579b937106f432467f19fe13e3b78ea0020af1867f7fbf5f11; secure.rs d15970c0daa2cdd64f33a01e23b20d3f01521309bb6cf07245e269e7354ff4b6. Remaining P0/P1 architecture is child .48.2.1: blind reservation callback is not CAS across owners; public protect methods bypass persistence; Context::new cannot prove keys fresh; SecureStack mutable stack permits plaintext bypass. Keep .48.2 open."}
Nonce reuse prevention complete; Observe explicitly deferred to linked feature
